channel.title: Eidos Works Insights
channel.description: Weekly field notes on storefront UX, production systems, automation, and applied intelligence.

item.title: What Makes a Custom InkSoft Storefront Feel Easier to Shop
item.description: A practical look at storefront hierarchy, category framing, product clarity, and mobile decisions.

item.title: How Production Dashboards Turn Shop Noise Into Action
item.description: How production teams can use due dates, departments, filters, exceptions, and daily briefs.

item.title: Why Apparel Mockups Matter Before Launch Day
item.description: Why apparel mockups improve buyer confidence and reduce launch friction.

item.title: Eidos Brain and Sentinel: A Practical Model for Small-Business Intelligence
item.description: A grounded model for using signals, exceptions, briefs, and human review.
